headline: BMO Capital Initiates Coverage On Parker Hannifin with Outperform Rating, Announces Price Target of $1090
summary: BMO Capital  analyst Daniel DiCicco   initiates coverage on Parker Hannifin (NYSE:PH) with a Outperform rating and announces Price Target of $1090.
